ClientBoard - Class in model.client
This is the model of a client has all the information that the client needs to know It has the central cards, the objectives, the players, the current player, the game state, the back of the decks and the chats It also has the player of the client it has a list of reduct players that are the other players
ClientBoard(CardObjective, CardObjective, ArrayList<ReductPlayer>, Player, ArrayList<CardResource>, ArrayList<CardGold>, GameState) - Constructor for class model.client.ClientBoard
